title: curculigo pilosa subsp. minor
intro: Curculigo pilosa subsp. minor, also known as miniature spotted cat's tail or small spotted curculigo, is a plant species belonging to the family Hypoxidaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various health conditions. The plant is valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to offer health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Curculigo pilosa subsp. minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and supplements, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance vitality and promote overall well-being.
